digitalBadges.heroSubtitle: Create and issue standards-compliant digital badges that recipients can share on LinkedIn, verify instantly, and stack into larger credentials.
digitalBadges.featuresTitle: Everything You Need for Digital Badges
digitalBadges.featuresSubtitle: Enterprise-grade badge issuance with consumer-grade simplicity.

badgeFeatures.title: Standards Compliant
badgeFeatures.desc: Every badge issued on CredSure meets industry standards, ensuring global interoperability and machine-readability.

badgeFeatures.title: Blockchain-Verified
badgeFeatures.desc: Each badge is anchored on the blockchain, making it tamper-proof and instantly verifiable by any employer or institution.

badgeFeatures.title: One-Click Social Sharing
badgeFeatures.desc: Recipients can share badges directly to LinkedIn, Twitter, and other platforms with a single click — boosting your brand visibility.

badgeFeatures.title: Real-Time Analytics
badgeFeatures.desc: Track badge views, shares, verifications, and engagement in real-time from your analytics dashboard.

badgeFeatures.title: LinkedIn Integration
badgeFeatures.desc: Badges can be directly added to LinkedIn profiles, increasing professional credibility and your program's reach.

badgeFeatures.title: Multi-Language Support
badgeFeatures.desc: Issue and verify badges in English and German, with metadata that adapts to the recipient's preferred language.

compareAccredible.tagline: CredSure offers transparent pricing, faster setup, guaranteed email delivery, and full white-labeling — everything you need to scale your digital credentialing program.

reasons.title: Transparent Pricing
reasons.desc: CredSure starts at €45/month with no hidden fees. Accredible charges $45/month for just 50 recipients with limited trial access.

reasons.title: Faster Time to Launch
reasons.desc: Issue your first credential in under 10 minutes with CredSure. Accredible typically requires 2-4 weeks of onboarding and setup.

reasons.title: 100% Email Deliverability
reasons.desc: CredSure uses optimized DNS, DMARC, and custom sender domains to guarantee every credential reaches inboxes. No more spam folder issues.

reasons.title: White-Label on All Plans
reasons.desc: Full white-labeling included on all paid plans. No extra charges for custom branding, sender domains, or branded verification pages.

reasons.title: Standards Compliant
reasons.desc: Every badge and certificate issued through CredSure is standards-compliant and interoperable across platforms.

reasons.title: Bilingual Platform
reasons.desc: Full English and German language support built-in. Issue, verify, and manage credentials in your recipients' preferred language.

faqs.a: Accredible starts at $45/month for 50 recipients. Higher tiers are custom priced and require annual contracts. CredSure offers transparent pricing starting at €45/month with monthly billing, billed annually.

faqs.q: Does Accredible offer a free trial?
faqs.a: Accredible offers a limited free trial upon request with restricted features. CredSure provides full platform access during the trial period.

faqs.q: Can I migrate from Accredible to CredSure?
faqs.a: Yes. CredSure offers free migration assistance. Our team will help you transfer your templates, recipient data, and credentials with zero downtime.

faqs.q: Is CredSure suitable for enterprise organizations?
faqs.a: Absolutely. CredSure serves organizations from startups to enterprises with SSO/SAML, custom domains, white-labeling, and dedicated account management.
CredSure integrates with Zapier (8,000+ apps), Moodle, Salesforce, HubSpot, Google Sheets, and many more. Our REST API allows custom integrations with any platform.

compareCredly.tagline: CredSure gives you enterprise-grade credentialing without the enterprise-only pricing. Self-serve setup, transparent plans, and full white-labeling from day one.

reasons.title: No Enterprise-Only Pricing
reasons.desc: Credly starts at $2,500/year with enterprise-focused pricing. CredSure starts at €45/month making it accessible for organizations of all sizes.

reasons.title: Self-Serve Setup
reasons.desc: CredSure lets you set up and issue credentials in minutes. Credly requires a sales-led onboarding process that can take 3-4 weeks.

reasons.title: Full White-Labeling
reasons.desc: CredSure includes white-labeling on all paid plans. Credly displays its own branding on credential pages, reducing your brand visibility.

reasons.title: Transparent Feature Access
reasons.desc: All CredSure features are available without gated tiers. Credly locks advanced features behind enterprise contracts.

reasons.title: Credential Certificates + Badges
reasons.desc: CredSure supports both digital certificates and badges from a single platform. Credly is primarily focused on digital badges only.

reasons.title: Bilingual by Default
reasons.desc: Full English and German support. Issue and verify credentials in multiple languages. Credly offers English-only interface.

faqs.a: Credly starts at approximately $2,500/year for basic access and scales to $11,000+/year for enterprise plans. CredSure starts at €45/month (billed annually) with no enterprise-only gating.
Credly focuses primarily on digital badges. If you need both certificates and badges, CredSure offers both from a single platform.

faqs.q: Can I try Credly for free?
faqs.a: Credly does not offer a free self-serve trial. You must contact sales. CredSure provides immediate access with a full-featured trial.

faqs.q: Can I migrate from Credly to CredSure?
faqs.a: Yes. CredSure offers free migration support. Our team will help transfer your badge programs, templates, and recipient data.

faqs.q: Is CredSure suitable for large organizations?
faqs.a: Yes. CredSure serves organizations from startups to enterprises with SSO/SAML, custom domains, white-labeling, and dedicated account management — without requiring enterprise-only contracts.
